text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I was just bemoaning the fact that
my very presence here makes these
posters simply disappear.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You can make posters disappear?! Wowie!
How're you doing that?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, by standing here, of course!
My dazzling countenance outshines all!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Dazzling? You mean light
makes them disappear?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okie-dokie! Then I'll go grab
a flashlight and help!
